meaning: n.怀疑,疑惑,疑问v.怀疑,不信,拿不准,<古>恐怕
examples: There was little doubt in my mind.
There is good reason to doubt this.
I doubt the feasibility of the plan.
Any serious handicapper would doubt the ability to place three winning bets in a row.
Francis offered to send an email, Leuco said, so no one would doubt the journalist's story.
